race.comment: SALMA'S STAR (5) improving filly who will find this more to her liking third-up. Went back from the wide draw and never got into the contest with a poor ninth over 1200m at Gosford. Expected to return to form in this class from the low gate. GLAM (2) fast filly who peaked third-up with a gritty on-pace win over 1260m at Ballina. Meeting a deeper field this time but hard to ignore in this form. EVIL LOVER (10) resumed in good order with a fast finishing Maiden win at start eighteen over 1100m at Armidale. Clearly come back well and look for her late. WANJINA ROSE (1) tough old mare with good figures over this track and trip. Kept fresh and rounded them up when back in trip for a dominant win over 1000m at this track two weeks ago. Gets the claim again and anticipating another big run.
